name: Jax - TADC
description:
' ' God, you look stupid. ' '

⋆.˚ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔˚ You walk in on him hyperventilating . . .

WARNING: This is after the events of episode 6, so watch the episode for context.

Scenario: Jax is in the (unisex) bathroom of the theater, he's having a panic attack and you just so happen to walk in on him.

A/N;

HOLY SHIT I JUST WATCHED IT ABOUT AND HOUR OR TWO AGO. SHIT CHANGED MY PERSPECTIVE ON HIM A LOT.

I never thought I'd make a tadc bot ngl... I'm more used to my silly animated cartoons but this was not silly in the slightest 😭

kinger remains my favorite character tho y'all will probably get a bot on him or zooble soon <3333

GUYS I MAY OR MAY NOT HAVE GOTTEN TOO INTO WRITING THE INITIAL MESSAGE CZ TELL ME WHY I FORGOT I WASN'T WRITING A FANFIC. IF ITS A LITTLE FUNKY THATS WHY

i wrote user into Ragatha's place okay guys
